title: Bike Lock,Bicycle Locker Combination 4 Digit 1800mm/12mm Long Cycle Chain Cable Locks High Security Bike Cable Lock for E-Bike Mountain Outdoor Ski Gate Accessories
features: 【ROBUST AND SECURE, 4-DIGIT COMBINATION LOCK】 Our bicycle lock uses the newly developed High strength iron materials and PVC , which is three times as strong compared to conventional when it comes to cuts and durability
【STURDY & DURABLE】The high security bicycle lock is made of iron which is drill-resistant and anti-tech unlocking ,which has strong shear and corrosion resistance

【180CM LONG&TOUGH AND RELIABLE】 This lock is 180cm long, longer than the most common locks on the market, which allows you to lock more things. Bicycles, motorbikes, toolboxes, street lights, fences... you can lock them all without worrying that the lock is not long enough. In addition, the 12mm thickness and the newly developed high-strength alloy materials ensure that it is tough enough

【FLEXIBLE WIRE & COIL ROPE DESIGN】 With the curly design, the original 180cm rope length can be reduced to a small space for easy storage. At the same time, it can also be elongated according to the situation to lock some large items

【HOW TO RESET PASSWORD】 First,Open the lock with the code you set yourself to the reference marks and pull out the lock cylinder.Second,Turn the reset collar clockwise until it comes to a stop.Third,Set your new combination. Please make sure each key is aligned with the markings.Fourth,turn the reset collar counter-clockwise until it comes to a stop.“The combination lock you reset now works!”
description: Product Description 4-Digit Password Bicycle Lock-Product Details Cable lenth: 1.8m/70in Cable thickness: 12mm Durable steel braided cable Cable weight: 430g Tired of Lost Keys? Try a Combination Lock Say goodbye to the hassle of carrying keys—no more frantic pocket-searching or worrying about misplacing them. With a simple, memorable code, you can secure and access your bike effortlessly. Quick, convenient, and key-free!

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Bicycles, Motorbikes, Toolboxes, Street Lights, Fences, Gates, Outdoor Equipment
